declaredLane: docs lifecycle and active owner simplification
observedMutationClass: docs index, progress, plan lifecycle, and document workflow guard
acceptanceEvidenceClass: rules-only closeout and docs lint; no gameplay acceptance evidence
rootCause: A phase-specific active plan was split out while the parent plan and progress phase table still read as direct owners of the same residual work, creating duplicate active-owner interpretation and code-path versus smoke-acceptance ambiguity.
prevention: Demoted the GameScene Agent A parent plan to reference, kept Phase 5 multiplayer sync and Agent B placement automation as the direct active owners, split progress code-path completion from smoke acceptance, and added a document workflow check for active parent re-evaluation after new active plan or phase extraction.
verification: Run npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout and npm run --silent rules:lint.
